code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(HealthTech_PatientRecords) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech的EMR同步服务设计一个熔断器模式。核心场景是：当HIPAA_Vault对外调用频繁失败时，要能快速切断请求流，避免级联故障。
明白了，熔断器有三个状态对吧？Closed是正常放行，Open是熔断阻断，还有一个中间态用来试探恢复？
对，Half-Open状态很关键。当Open状态持续一段时间后，只允许有限的测试请求通过，验证服务是否恢复。另外每个状态都要绑定具体的HealthTech组件，比如DiagnosticEngine负责健康检查。
好，我先画出主状态流转：Closed初始状态，失败阈值超标时跳转到Open；Open超时后进入HalfOpen；HalfOpen的测试请求成功则回到Closed，失败则重回Open。
还需要补充自环和细节。Closed状态下成功请求保持Closed，失败请求也留在Closed但累计计数；Open状态下如果还有请求尝试，继续留在Open；HalfOpen等待测试时也保持自身状态。
已添加三个自环。现在加上状态注释：Closed要说明全量放行、监控失败率、跟踪响应时间、递增错误计数器；Open要说明阻断请求、返回缓存或错误、记录被阻日志；HalfOpen强调有限吞吐和快速决策。
检查一下触发条件标注：Closed到Open的触发要明确是EMR_Sync的失败阈值超标；HalfOpen回到Closed的成功测试也要绑定EMR_Sync，这样和实际组件对应。
确认已调整：Closed→Open标注为HealthTech_EMR_Sync的失败阈值超标；HalfOpen→Closed标注为HealthTech_EMR_Sync的测试请求成功。另外PatientRecords的失败请求、DiagnosticEngine的请求尝试和等待测试也都已绑定对应组件。
